noModHint: No games found. Press  to add via Add Project
duplicateWarning: Detected {} game(s) with duplicate TIDs, highlighted in red. Do not create games with the same TID in different directories, as this may cause data management conflicts. Please manually merge the related game folders on the SD card.
confirmNameMsg:
Use this as the display title?

{}
restoreNameMsg:
Restore display title to this title?

{}
removeConfirm: Custom title, description, and other data will be deleted. Related MODs will be moved to transit and can be re-added later. Remove this game?
clearConfirm: Clearing transit cannot be undone. Proceed with caution!
manualRenameDesc: Manually enter a custom display title
onlineFetchDesc:
Match localized game title from cloud
 - Currently supports Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and English only
restoreNameDesc: Delete custom title and restore to the official original name
addGameDesc: Select from locally installed games on this console, or manually enter a TID to add. Use  on the home page to quickly jump to local add
removeGameDesc:
Remove the current game project
 - The current game project must not contain installed mods
 - Game mods will be moved to transit
viewPathDesc: View the current game's location on the SD card
resetStateBody: When the mod state saved by the app is completely inconsistent with the mod files actually installed on the SD card, use this feature to clear all state data and rebuild a clean mod environment.
resetStateCasesBody:
- Full reinstall of an Atmosphere pack. Only use after deleting the existing Atmosphere files and performing a clean installation. Do not use with an overwrite installation.

- Importing someone else's shared \mods2 files. Before importing, make sure your own \mods2 folder is empty. Do not import when it already contains data.
resetStateWarningBody: Only use this function in the two situations above. Using it in any other situation will completely corrupt the mod state data.
resetStateBtn: Press  to Cancel, Hold  to Confirm
resetComplete: All game states have been reset!
clearTransitDesc: Permanently delete MOD files in transit. This cannot be undone, proceed with caution
deleteIconCacheDesc: This will delete locally cached game icon files. Use it only when icons display incorrectly on the mod store game page.
basicSettingsDesc:
Adjust basic usage preferences
 - Language
 - Theme
 - Button sound
advancedSettingsDesc:
Adjust performance and status monitor options
 - FPS Monitor
 - Memory Monitor
 - CPU Boost
assistFeaturesDesc:
Use utilities to manage local data
 - Clear Transit
 - Repair Icons
 - Reset State
themeColorDesc: Set the app UI theme color. Takes effect after restart
soundEffectDesc: Enable or disable button sound effects
cpuBoostDesc: Temporarily raise CPU frequency while using MTP/FTP, downloading, installing, or uninstalling MODs
fpsMonitorDesc: Show current frame rate in the top status bar
memMonitorDesc: Show heap memory usage in the top status bar
languageDesc: Set the app UI display language. Takes effect after restart
langRestartMsg: Language will take effect after restart. Restart now?
themeRestartMsg: Theme will take effect after restart. Restart now?
uploadModDesc:
- Scan QR code to visit the web store
 - Web only provides browsing and mod uploading
 - Uploading pornographic, political, sensitive or illegal content is prohibited and will result in permanent ban
 - URL: https://tom-switch.fun
nicknameDesc: Username displayed when commenting on mod detail pages in the store
addProjectSubmenuDesc:
Choose how to add a game project to the home page
 - Store Add
 - Local Add
storeAddSubmenuDesc:
Pick games from the online mod store, or press  on the home page to open the store
 - Game Store
 - Mod Store
 - Upload Mod
gameStoreDesc: Browse the game list in the online store
modStoreDesc: Browse online mods for the current game
renameSubmenuDesc:
Customize game display title
 - Manual input
 - Online fetch
 - Restore title
manageSubmenuDesc:
Manage game projects in the list

 - Remove project
 - View location
settingsSubmenuDesc:
Customize plugin settings

 - Basic settings

 - Utilities

Plugin info and help
 - Introduction

 - Donate
 - Feedback
 - Quick start
 - FAQ
checkUpdateDesc: Check and update the plugin to the latest version
updateDialogSupportDesc: Running the servers and maintaining the project requires substantial effort. If this project has been helpful to you, please consider donating via the QR codes below. Thank you for supporting the project.
sortFilterDesc:
Sort and filter game projects
 - Sort by Title
 - Sort by Mod Count
 - Sort by Recent Play
sortByNameDesc: Sort by title in pinyin order
sortByRecentDesc: Sort by recently played order on console
firstLaunchNoticeBody: If you use this manager to install mods for a game, do not modify that game's mod files on the SD card manually or with other tools, as doing so may leave residual files or cause management conflicts.
firstLaunchQuickStartBody: On the home page, press  to enter the mod store and download mods, or press  to add local mods to the manager. Please read the relevant prompts carefully before using each feature to avoid data loss. To view the detailed user guide, press  on the home page and select "About".
firstLaunchDisclaimerBody: This project is maintained by one person who is not a professional developer. There is no guarantee that the software is free of critical bugs. Any save data corruption or mod file damage that may result is the user's own responsibility.
